long_desc: Dagaronzie the Green Dragon grins evilly at you.
detailed_desc:
This majestous green dragon is huge and
his skin is densely covered with   
small and regular scales. His face looks calm, his neck is long and awsome.
His body is firmly settled upon his four legs, but you know that the beast 
can walk under his two paws. His two forepaws have long fingers, and they  
look quite nimb.
